jobs.title: Lead, Product Manager
jobs.descriptionSnippet: L3Harris is dedicated to recruiting and developing high-performing talent who are passionate about what they do. Our employees are unified in a shared dedication to our customers’ mission and quest for professional growth. L3Harris provides an inclusive, engaging environment designed to empower employees and promote work-life success. Fundamental to our culture is an unwavering focus on values, dedication to our communities, and commitment to excellence in everything we do. L3Harris is the Trus…

jobs.title: Product Manager
jobs.descriptionSnippet: Bilingue FR/EN. The sky's the limit. A seat at the table, with the people who can actually move things, in a business that's already working. Now we're levelling up to what's next. If that landed, keep reading. Who we are It started with two founders, a basement, and a phone book. Two years of cold calls before there was even an office to make them from. The people running this floor today are the ones who did that work. They remember what it takes. Which is why product judgment carries real we…

jobs.title: ASSOCIATE PRODUCT MANAGER, MERCHANDISING
jobs.descriptionSnippet: Job Description Pay Range: $75,000 - $105,000 At The Home Depot Canada, we want you to feel valued and supported. The pay range you see represents base salary only. In addition, your total rewards may include: semi-annual bonuses tied to business performance; Deferred Profit-Sharing Program to assist with retirement savings; comprehensive paid benefits; a 15% discount on Home Depot stock purchases; and merit-based salary increases. We are committed to recognizing your efforts and supporting you…

jobs.title: Technical Product Manager – B2B Technology
jobs.descriptionSnippet: We are partnering with an innovative Quebec-based technology company that develops advanced hardware and software solutions for mission-critical environments where reliability, performance, and user experience are essential. As the company continues to grow, they are looking to add a Product Manager who will serve as the bridge between engineering, customers, and commercial teams to accelerate product development, market adoption, and long-term commercial success. This is an excellent opportuni…

jobs.title: Product Manager fiduciary services and Pricing Strategy
jobs.descriptionSnippet: A career as a Product Manager within the National Bank Trust team means playing a strategic role at the heart of defining and executing strategies related to fiduciary products and the sector’s pricing strategy. In this key role, you contribute to the development and evolution of high value-added solutions-specifically our offering in estates, trusts, and philanthropy-by guiding decisions related to innovation, pricing, distribution, and product lifecycle management. You also ensure regulatory …

jobs.title: Responsable Produit - Digital Substation Product Manager H/F
jobs.descriptionSnippet: Job Description Summary Nous recherchons un(e) leader innovant et expérimenté pour piloter la vision, la stratégie et l'exécution de nos solutions d'automatisation des postes électriques numériques et conventionnels. Le/la Responsable Produit sera chargé(e) de définir l'orientation du portefeuille d'automatisation des postes, d'assurer sa différenciation concurrentielle et de favoriser sa croissance sur les marchés mondiaux.
